description: 20 evaluation questions with gold answers for Groundedness, Citation Accuracy, and latency (p50/p95).

questions.question: What is the failover time if the AWS primary region is unavailable, and who initiates the disaster recovery protocol?
questions.gold_answer: The CTO initiates failover to the backup region within 15 minutes.

questions.question: Where is the designated safe assembly location at the UCH site in case of fire or structural emergency?
questions.gold_answer: The muster point is the main parking lot outside the Pharmacy Department.

questions.question: How often are backups performed, and when is restoration tested?
questions.gold_answer: Backups every 6 hours; restoration tested monthly on the first Sunday.

questions.question: What is the system state for expired or suspect product where the product cannot be dispensed until cleared?
questions.gold_answer: Quarantine Zone.

questions.question: What are the core hours when employees must be available for synchronous communication, and in which time zone?
questions.gold_answer: 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM West Africa Time (WAT).

questions.question: What should we do if the Solana RPC endpoint is unreachable or rate-limited, and who owns that scenario?
questions.gold_answer: Switch to backup RPC provider (e.g. Helius, QuickNode); env var swap and redeploy. Owner: Blockchain Lead.

questions.question: What authentication is required for the Vectix Foundry production environment?
questions.gold_answer: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) is required.

questions.question: How many days of PTO do full-time employees get per year, and how many can be carried over?
questions.gold_answer: 20 days PTO per year; up to 5 days can be carried over.

questions.question: What is the daily meal stipend for international travel between Nigeria and the USA?
questions.gold_answer: $75 daily meal stipend.

questions.question: On what date does VectixLogic observe Nigerian Independence Day?
questions.gold_answer: October 1, 2026 (Nigeria).

questions.question: When do formal performance reviews occur, and what bonus is an Exceeds Expectations rating eligible for?
questions.gold_answer: Bi-annually in June and December. EE eligible for 10–15% bonus.

questions.question: What is the response time for a critical (system down) client issue?
questions.gold_answer: 1 hour response time for critical (system down).

questions.question: Within how many business days must company equipment be returned after resignation or termination?
questions.gold_answer: Within 3 business days to Lagos or Wyoming office.

questions.question: How long must pharmacy electronic records be stored per PCN standards?
questions.gold_answer: Minimum 5 years per PCN.

questions.question: Must AI-generated code be peer-reviewed before merge to main?
questions.gold_answer: Yes; all AI-generated code must be peer-reviewed before merge to main.

questions.question: What is the one-time home office stipend amount?
questions.gold_answer: $500 one-time stipend for home office setup.

questions.question: By when must Schedule II physical count be completed each week at UCH?
questions.gold_answer: Every Friday by 4:00 PM.

questions.question: What are the disciplinary steps for code of conduct violations?
questions.gold_answer: Verbal warning (1st), written warning (2nd), termination (3rd).

questions.question: When do promotion nominations occur?
questions.gold_answer: During the December review cycle.

questions.question: What is the annual learning and development budget for certifications?
questions.gold_answer: $1,500 per year for certifications (e.g. AWS, Rust, Blockchain Security).
